MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Mark Hooshmand (415-835-5900) of Hooshmand Law Group for Alix Santa-Igelisa, plaintiff and moving party / Vincent Adams (415-291-8844) of Van de Poel, Levy & Allen for Laleh Zelinsky, defendant and opposing party; Andy Mendoza (626-373-2444) of P.K. Schrieffer LLP appearing via CourtCall for defendant Thakor (Not party to Motion)

ARGUED - Court having reviewed the pleadings and having heard oral argument adopts the tentative ruling as follows: Plaintiffs' Motion For A Protective Order; Request For Monetary Sanctions Against Defendant Laleh Zelinsky, And His Counsel Of Record, Vincent J. Adams And Kara Ann Smith Pursuant To Ccp 2019.030, 2023.010 And 2030.090 is denied - discovery relevant to claims made by plaintiff - while large they are based on clear allegations made in complaint. Sanctions denied as to each party. Prevailing party to prepare order. Counsel to leave compliance date blank and that will be filled in by Court. Judge Ronald E. Quidachay, Clerk: M. Smith, Not reported (D501)
